name: Stoplight
description: Stoplight API design, documentation, and governance platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Stoplight
2. Go to Account → API Tokens
3. Create a new token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.helpText: Stoplight → Account → API Tokens → Create Token
